item.title: Peach Tones for Under-Eye Neutralizing

item.title: Smitha Deepak’s Hair Mask Tutorial
item.description: A simple hair mask tutorial from Smitha Deepak, focused on helping hair look smooth and shiny.

media:content.media:title: Smitha Deepak’s Hair Mask Tutorial
media:content.media:description: A simple hair mask tutorial from Smitha Deepak, focused on helping hair look smooth and shiny.

item.title: I found the secret to a perfect foxy eye using just a piece of tape
item.description: Applying eyeshadow doesn't have to be a struggle, even if you have hooded eyes or are just starting out. In this tutorial, I'm breaking down three iconic looks—the foxy eye, the smoky eye, and the cut crease, using a surprisingly simple tool. You’ll see exactly how to prime, placement tricks with tape, and the "swipe and dab" method that ensures a perfect blend every single time.

media:content.media:title: I found the secret to a perfect foxy eye using just a piece of tape
media:content.media:description: Applying eyeshadow doesn't have to be a struggle, even if you have hooded eyes or are just starting out. In this tutorial, I'm breaking down three iconic looks—the foxy eye, the smoky eye, and the cut crease, using a surprisingly simple tool. You’ll see exactly how to prime, placement tricks with tape, and the "swipe and dab" method that ensures a perfect blend every single time.

item.title: Three-Product Routine for an Everyday Glow
item.description: Smitha Deepak shares a quick makeup routine using just three products for a polished, natural-looking everyday glow.

media:content.media:title: Three-Product Routine for an Everyday Glow
media:content.media:description: Smitha Deepak shares a quick makeup routine using just three products for a polished, natural-looking everyday glow.
